summary: V8.1 backend regression — 35/35 PASSED in 7s. Verified 100% placeholder coverage delta: (1) caiet_sarcini new section 4.1 'Detalii tehnologice specifice' renders with Electrofuziune/Cupru/2.5/PVC rigid Ø110/Wavin/0.5 markers + 4.2 Repartiție traseu (18, Trotuar, carosabil) + 4.3 Conductă existentă (Aurel Vlaicu, PE 100, DN 110, SDR 11, 1.5 bar); (2) memoriu_tehnic now shows CARTOUCHE block at top (DTAC + PTH, REDUSA PRESIUNE, OL OSD 4567, ISC-NOTIF, denumire_lucrare_extinsa) while prior sections (Vaillant/0.30/Categoria/Exigențe) still present; (3) carte_tehnica now has 3-col footer signature (Proiectant/Executant/Verificator) with full ANRE auth details PDD/2022/0001 + EDD/2023/0145 + VGD-LEG-7821; (4) borderou CARTOUCHE + materiale catalog codes OSD-COD-23445/23446/87921 visible; (5) pv_calitate new sections 5 (Verdict probă presiune CORESPUNZ) + 6 (Mențiuni speciale) appear with pv_calitate_nr as fallback. REGRESSION: all 26 templates from registry (17 base + 9 extra) render 200 OK with valid DOCX (PK) > 5KB each — 3-col footer change did NOT break any. Dossier ZIP still contains 26 DOCX + 1 manifest. POST /api/payments/checkout returns valid https://checkout.stripe.com/ URL + session_id. GET /api/me/billing returns correct {current_plan{plan_id,name,price_eur,renews_at}, transactions[], activations[]} shape.
critical_code_review_comments: gas_doc_templates.py is now ~1220 lines; _project_cartouche + _footer_signature helpers are well-factored but the per-template builder functions (memoriu_tehnic, caiet_sarcini, carte_tehnica) are still long. Consider splitting builders into a sub-module (gas_doc_builders/) when next round of templates is added — file size is approaching the 700-line guideline threshold.

Cartouche block is rendered by calling _project_cartouche(doc, ctx) after _company_header in 4 templates (memoriu, caiet_sarcini, carte_tehnica, borderou). If any of denumire_lucrare_extinsa/faza_proiectare/presiune_categorie/ordin_lucru_nr_data is missing in ctx, the helper should render an empty cell rather than KeyError — confirmed in code via ctx.get() with default ''. Good.

3-col footer signature in _footer_signature uses a 3-cell table; the 3 ANRE auth strings (proiectant_aut_nr+grad / executant_aut_nr+grad / verificator_legitimatie_nr) are concatenated with ' / ' separator. Looks correct for all 26 templates — no rendering exception observed even for templates that didn't previously consume verificator fields.

_pv_calitate now reads pv_calitate_nr OR pv_calitate_pv_numar (good fallback). Sections 5/6 are conditionally appended only when pv_calitate_proba_admisa/mentiuni keys are truthy — verified by the PASSED assertion seeing 'Verdict' + 'Mențiuni' + 'CORESPUNZ' tokens. Good.
The dossier.zip still produces 26 DOCX + 1 manifest = 27 files; no new template was added in V8.1 (only existing ones were extended with cartouche/sections). Consistent with iteration_6 baseline.
All 26 parametrized regression renders PASSED — strong evidence the 3-col footer change is non-breaking. Total suite time 7s (10s including login).
